steps.name: upload_times
steps.label: Optimal Upload Time
steps.description: Find average time with highest active users per platform

steps.name: hashtags
steps.label: Hashtags
steps.description: 3-4 per video, generate new ones specific to each video

steps.name: sounds
steps.label: Sounds/Music
steps.description: Find viral sounds, favorite them, attach to video

steps.name: captions
steps.label: Post Caption
steps.description: Use Curiosity Captions or PCM Captions — MUST have

steps.name: story_boost
steps.label: Story Repost
steps.description: Decide whether to repost on story for extra visibility

steps.name: quality
steps.label: Upload Quality
steps.description: Enable high quality upload setting — always max resolution

youtube_specific.name: end_screen
youtube_specific.label: End Screen
youtube_specific.description: Add end screen with next video + subscribe

youtube_specific.name: cards
youtube_specific.label: Cards
youtube_specific.description: Add relevant cards at key moments

self_check: Is this valuable enough to charge $5 for?
Did I actually think this content out?
Am I proud of this piece?
Would I watch this if it came on my FYP?
quality_gate.pcm_check: Does it cross off 3-6 PCM personality types?
quality_gate.read_aloud: Read it out loud — does it sound smooth and authentic?
